recommendations.title: Shinjuku Incident
recommendations.overview: A simple Chinese immigrant wages a perilous war against one of the most powerful criminal organizations on the planet.

recommendations.title: I Am All Girls
recommendations.overview: A special crimes investigator forms an unlikely bond with a serial killer to bring down a global child sex trafficking syndicate.

recommendations.title: RE:BORN
recommendations.overview: A former special forces operative struggling to contain the destructive impulses of his past goes on a rampage against a squad of ruthless assassins.

recommendations.title: Almost Cops
recommendations.overview: When an overeager community officer and a reckless ex-detective are forced to team up, plenty of chaos ensues on the streets of Rotterdam.

recommendations.title: Transfusion
recommendations.overview: Ryan Logan, a former Special Forces operative, is battling to cope with life after the loss of his wife.  He is thrusted into the criminal underworld to keep his only son from being taken from him.

recommendations.title: AKA
recommendations.overview: A steely special ops agent finds his morality put to the test when he infiltrates a crime syndicate and unexpectedly bonds with the boss' young son.

recommendations.title: Behind Enemy Lines III: Colombia
recommendations.overview: Navy SEALS mount an attack on Colombian special forces to clear their names and rescue a hostage.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: The Beast
recommendations.overview: To rescue his daughter, an unstable Special Forces veteran unleashes his inner beast as he pursues her kidnappers — and soon becomes a suspect himself.

recommendations.title: Taken
